scope: Runtime-neutral, secret-free Codex OAuth volume, mount, Omnigent host-binding, and host-lease contracts

gapStatus.notes: Direct, Omnigent, and OAuth-maintenance consumers are not yet all wired through one release-last lease lifecycle.

gapStatus.requirement: Add profile-bound credential and host contracts
gapStatus.notes: Added runtime-neutral AuthVolumeRef, CredentialMountRef, OmnigentOAuthHostBinding, and OmnigentHostLease schemas with secret-free fields, fixed one-host/one-session limits, ownership checks, generation, and lifecycle validation. Durable database persistence and runtime ownership validation remain open.

gapStatus.requirement: Materialize, preflight, and route the destination host
gapStatus.notes: The new contracts provide typed inputs for this work, but host materialization, destination preflight, and exact-host routing remain absent.
Generation/drain transitions, reconciliation, checkpoints, and Workflow Detail lifecycle evidence remain absent.

Added schema tests for valid secret-free refs, cross-profile rejection, absolute mount paths, fixed capacity, and host-lease timestamps. Pytest is unavailable in the runtime, so the controlling unit suite did not start; syntax, contract smoke, Alembic graph, and diff hygiene passed.

targetedLocalChecks.command: Python model-construction smoke for AuthVolumeRef, CredentialMountRef, OmnigentOAuthHostBinding, and OmnigentHostLease

summary: Attempt 4 partially closes the profile-bound credential and host-contract gap. The broader MM-1207 lifecycle backlog remains open and bounded by the latest verification report.
